2603.21250.title: Graph of States: Solving Abductive Tasks with Large Language Models
2603.21250.paper_summary: Logical reasoning encompasses deduction, induction, and abduction. However, while Large Language Models (LLMs) have effectively mastered the former two, abductive reasoning remains significantly underexplored. Existing frameworks, predominantly designed for static deductive tasks, fail to generalize to abductive reasoning due to unstructured state representation and lack of explicit state control. Consequently, they are inevitably prone to Evidence Fabrication, Context Drift, Failed Backtracking, and Early Stopping. To bridge this gap, we introduce Graph of States (GoS), a general-purpose neuro-symbolic framework tailored for abductive tasks. GoS grounds multi-agent collaboration in a structured belief states, utilizing a causal graph to explicitly encode logical dependencies and a state machine to govern the valid transitions of the reasoning process. By dynamically aligning the reasoning focus with these symbolic constraints, our approach transforms aimless, unconstrained exploration into a convergent, directed search. Extensive evaluations on two real-world datasets demonstrate that GoS significantly outperforms all baselines, providing a robust solution for complex abductive tasks. Code repo and all prompts: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Graph-of-States-5B4E.
2603.21250.paper_summary_zh: 邏輯推理包括演繹、歸納和溯因。<lb/>然而，儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）已有效掌握前兩者，但溯因推理仍然顯著未被探索。<lb/>現有框架主要設計用於靜態演繹任務，因為缺乏結構化的狀態表示和明確的狀態控制，無法推廣到溯因推理。<lb/>因此，它們不可避免地容易受到證據捏造、上下文漂移、回溯失敗和提前停止的影響。<lb/>為了彌補這一空白，我們引入了狀態圖（GoS），這是一個專為溯因任務量身定制的通用神經符號框架。<lb/>GoS 將多代理協作基於結構化的信念狀態，利用因果圖明確編碼邏輯依賴性，並使用狀態機來管理推理過程的有效轉換。<lb/>通過動態調整推理重點與這些符號約束，我們的方法將無目的的、無約束的探索轉變為收斂的、有指向性的搜索。<lb/>在兩個真實世界數據集上的廣泛評估顯示，GoS 顯著超越所有基準，為複雜的溯因任務提供了穩健的解決方案。<lb/>代碼庫和所有提示：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Graph-of-States-5B4E。
2603.21250.author: Yu Luo et.al.
2603.21250.authors: Yu Luo, Rongchen Gao, Lu Teng, Xidao Wen, Jiamin Jiang, Qingliang Zhang, Yongqian Sun, Shenglin Zhang, Jiasong Feng, Tong Liu, Wenjie Zhang, Dan Pei
